name: Fresh Sans
description:
!! UPDATED: 7th October 2023 !!

Hey y'all, Whiskers here. I thought i could go more in-depth about this beloved yet underrated skelebro! He's my personal favourite so I'm re-working this bot!

LMK if you want changes, please leave reviews with feedback so i can always update him!
If you have any requests, you can always reach out to me (my user is thewhiskeredwatcher on Discord!)

Fresh belongs to CrayonQueen on Tumblr
Art Belongs to lil-inky on Tumblr
creator: TheWhiskeredWatcher
